title: Create: Diamonds & Scrap
description: Adds netherite scrap and diamonds craft
body:
Adds:
Leather from rotten flash
Slime ball & blaze powder from magma cream
Use cobblestone for craft netherrack & magma block
Netherite scrap blasting from netherite dust block (4 netherite dust)
Netherite dust crafting by sequenced assembly
Tuff from diorite and andesite

enjoy this addon :3
